How we help › Clinical Remedial Massage
For all • All ages • Every stage of life

Skilled massage therapy to ease pain and release tension

Hands-on treatment that gets to the root of tightness, pain and restricted movement, tailored to you and adjusted as you progress.

What it's for

Treatment that restores balance, not just relief

Clinical Remedial Massage is a focused, therapeutic treatment, not a spa treat. It works on the muscles, fascia and connective tissue that hold tension, restrict movement and throw your posture out of balance, whatever the cause: a physical job, a sporting habit, an old injury, or simply the wear of day to day life. Far from being just for sports people, it suits anybody wanting to ease pain, guard against injury, or simply move and feel better, regardless of age or ability.

Each session starts with a detailed assessment of what is actually tight, restricted or out of balance, and why. Treatment is matched to that, and used as much to prevent problems and support recovery as to treat pain once it has set in, whether that means easing an old niggle, supporting recovery around training or competition, or simply keeping you feeling well.

Get in touch

The easiest first step is a conversation. Tell us what is going on and we will point you the right way, with no pressure at all.

Call 07773 814488
What to expect

What Clinical Remedial Massage involves

A detailed assessment

We check what is actually driving the tension, pain or imbalance, not just where it is felt.

Skilled, hands-on treatment

Focused massage therapy to ease pain, release tight tissue and restore comfortable movement.

Balance, prevention and recovery

Treatment that helps correct posture and imbalance, guards against injury, and supports recovery around training, work or everyday life.

What it means for you

Hands-on care, tailored to you

Every session is adjusted to what your body needs on the day: firmer where tension calls for it, gentler where it does not, and reviewed as you progress rather than following a fixed routine.

Reassurance

Safe, gentle, and at your pace

Everything is done with care and at a pace that suits you, and nothing is rushed or forced. The aim throughout is simple: that you feel in good hands, understood, and steadily better.

How we help

Part of a wider range of connected care

Clinical Remedial Massage is one of eight connected services, matched to you rather than delivered from a fixed menu.

Recognised and accountable

Held to recognised professional standards

Members and registrants of the Royal Society of Medicine, the Complementary and Natural Healthcare Council, the Institute for Functional Medicine, the Society of Sports Therapists, the Institute of Sport and Remedial Massage and the British Medical Acupuncture Society, among others.
